title: BASIC COMPUTER SKILLS CLASSES FOR SENIOR IMMIGRANTS - 211info
text: ACCENT NETWORK BASIC COMPUTER SKILLS CLASSES FOR SENIOR IMMIGRANTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic computer skills lessons for beginners, focusing on Russian and Ukrainian population. Virtual and in-person options are available. 12254 SW Garden Place Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Older adults who are immigrants, refugees, or asylum seekers Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 280-6738 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 280-6738 Marina Drots [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Russian, Ukrainian AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On TriMet bus lines: -12, SW Barbur & Luradel stop -44, SW Capitol Highway & Huber stop -64 and 94, SW Barbur & Capitol Highway stop Services: Computer Literacy Training Programs * Older Adults * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Computer Literacy Training Programs * Older Adults * Russian Community Computer Literacy Training Programs * Older Adults * Ukrainian Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT EMPLOYMENT - IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - APPLICATION FORM ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
